title: covalent_degrader_v1 — COVALENT-DEGRADER sub-axis output rows
description: Output schema for _python_bridge/module/covalent_degrader_sim.py. One row per covalent bifunctional degrader: the irreversible covalent-engagement kinetics (kinact/K_i) of the covalent warhead, the mass-action reversible occupancy of the other warhead, and their ternary-complex coupling. COVALENT-DEGRADER is a SUB-AXIS :> BIFUNCTIONAL (expansion-main, AXIS/HIERARCHY.tape) — NOT a hexa-bio core-5 axis; its covalent-warhead chemistry crosses to the COVALENT expansion-main axis. In-silico simulator-consistency only; COVALENT-DEGRADER is research/early-clinical (AGENTS.tape g8/f2).

covalent_degrader.description: Covalent degrader identifier within the deterministic panel.

covalent_end.description: Which of the two warheads is the covalent one — the target warhead or the E3 recruiter.

drug_precedent.description: Own modality precedent (g3/f1 — described by precedent, never lattice-derived).

modality_stage.description: Development stage; COVALENT-DEGRADER is research/early-clinical (not an approved class).

conc_degrader_nM.description: Assay concentration of the bifunctional covalent degrader (nM).

conc_other_partner_nM.description: Assay concentration of the non-covalent partner (target or E3) for the reversible engagement (nM).

k_i_nM.description: Reversible encounter-complex dissociation constant of the covalent warhead before the irreversible step (nM).

k_inact_per_s.description: Irreversible covalent-commitment rate of the covalent warhead (1/s).

t_exposure_s.description: Exposure window over which covalent engagement accumulates (s).

covalent_engaged_fraction.description: Covalently-engaged fraction f_cov(t) = 1 - exp(-k_obs*t); monotone-increasing, asymptotes to 1.0.

k_d_other_nM.description: Dissociation constant of the other (reversible) warhead (nM).

alpha.description: Ternary cooperativity factor (>= 1) on the reversible second site.

reversible_site_fraction.description: Mass-action occupancy of the reversible engagement site.

reversible_match_engaged_fraction.description: Matched all-reversible reference: engaged fraction if the covalent end were reversible with K_d = K_i.

reversible_match_ternary_fraction.description: Ternary fraction of the matched all-reversible reference degrader.

covalent_ternary_advantage.description: Covalent ternary fraction divided by the matched all-reversible ternary fraction.

off_rate_removed.description: True iff the covalent-engaged fraction strictly exceeds the matched reversible plateau (the off-rate is removed).
